steps.message: You are Forge agent (Claude Opus 4.6), a coding agent that solves terminal-bench tasks.

Analyze the following program that contains a secret key. The goal is to extract this secret key and save it to `/app/results.txt`.

The program is available as an executable. You may need to interact with it in various ways to discover how to access the secret information.

The secret key is in the format `FLAG{...}`

The task is complete when you have successfully extracted the secret key and written it to `/app/results.txt`.

Update Todos
[] Inspect binary layout and confirm exploit path
[ ] Run exploit and write FLAG to /app/results.txt
[ ] Verify results format and clean intermediate files
Execute [/bin/sh] ls -la /app && command -v python3 && command -v readelf && command -v objdump

arguments.command: ls -la /app && command -v python3 && command -v readelf && command -v objdump

results.content:
import os
assert os.path.exists('/app/results.txt'), '/app/results.txt does not exist'
content = open('/app/results.txt').read().strip()
assert content.startswith('FLAG{') and content.endswith('}'), f'Invalid format: {content}'
print(content)
PY
